summary: Wayfarer performs ZERO remote AI inference. All inference — translation (Bergamot NMT), OCR (ONNX), and the multimodal assistant (SmolVLM2) — runs entirely on-device through @qvac/sdk. The only network activity is the one-time download of model weights from the QVAC model registry; once cached, the app is fully offline (verifiable in airplane mode).

remoteNonAiCalls.name: QVAC model registry (weight download)
remoteNonAiCalls.purpose: Download model weights on first use of a feature; cached on the device permanently afterwards.
remoteNonAiCalls.trigger: First time a given model is loaded (per feature/language).
endpoints: Resolved internally by @qvac/sdk from registry:// descriptors (Amazon S3 / Hugging Face CDN)
remoteNonAiCalls.dataSent: None. Plain HTTP GET of public model files. No user text, photos, or telemetry are transmitted.

thirdPartyServices.name: Expo Application Services (EAS Build)
thirdPartyServices.purpose: Optional cloud build to produce a shareable Android APK. Not used at runtime and performs no AI inference.

notes: The on-device inference audit log (model loads/unloads, TTFT, tokens/sec) can be exported from the in-app Privacy sheet for verification.
